groupings.title: Start here
groupings.description: What Fund402 is and how an agent should use these skills.

groupings.title: Agent (pay & repay)
groupings.description: Let an autonomous agent pay x402-gated endpoints with just-in-time credit from the Fund402 lending pool, and repay its loans.

groupings.title: Liquidity (LP)
groupings.description: Provide liquidity to the pool and earn yield from the JIT credit fee.

groupings.title: Merchant & operator
groupings.description: Create x402 endpoints settled by the pool, and manage agent wallets / liquidity / reputation.

groupings.title: Clawback (escrow + disputes)
groupings.description: A separate settlement layer: agent payment escrow with AI-adjudicated disputes (chargebacks for the machine economy).
